name: -d
--diff
options.description: Compare two files with each other

name: -a
--add
options.description: Add folder(s) to the last active window

name: -g
--goto
options.description: Open a file at the path on the specified line and character position

name: -n
--new-window
options.description: Force to open a new window

name: -r
--reuse-window
options.description: Force to open a file or folder in an already opened window

name: -w
--wait
options.description: Wait for the files to be closed before returning

options.name: --locale
options.description: The locale to use (e.g. en-US or zh-TW)

options.name: --user-data-dir
options.description: Specifies the directory that user data is kept in. Can be used to open multiple distinct instances of Code

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print usage

options.name: --extensions-dir
options.description: Set the root path for extensions

options.name: --list-extensions
options.description: List the installed extensions

options.name: --category
options.description: Filters installed extensions by provided category, when using --list-extensions

options.name: --show-versions
options.description: Show versions of installed extensions, when using --list-extensions

options.name: --install-extension
options.description:
Installs or updates the extension. The identifier of an extension is always `${publisher}.${name}

Use `--force` argument to update to latest version. To install a specific version provide `@${version}`. For example: 'vscode.csharp@1.2.3'

options.name: --uninstall-extension
options.description: Uninstalls an extension

options.name: --enable-proposed-api
options.description: Enables proposed API features for extensions. Can receive one or more extension IDs to enable individually

name: -v
--version
options.description: Print version

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print verbose output (implies --wait)

options.name: --log
options.description: Log level to use. Default is 'info' when unspecified

name: -s
--status
options.description: Print process usage and diagnostics information

options.name: --prof-startup
options.description: Run CPU profiler during startup

options.name: --disable-extensions
options.description: Disable all installed extensions

options.name: --disable-extension
options.description: Disable an extension

options.name: --sync
options.description: Turn sync on or off

options.name: --inspect-extensions
options.description: Allow debugging and profiling of extensions. Check the developer tools for the connection URI

options.name: --inspect-brk-extensions
options.description: Allow debugging and profiling of extensions with the extension host being paused after start. Check the developer tools for the connection URI

options.name: --disable-gpu
options.description: Disable GPU hardware acceleration

options.name: --max-memory
options.description: Max memory size for a window (in Mbytes)

options.name: --telemetry
options.description: Shows all telemetry events which VS code collects
